text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so you were hiding under the playground
equipment. Come out, it's dangerous under there!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I asked you to come on out, not to pounce on me!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Geez... You're just like Tome's Hatsuratsu! You've
got the same mischievous streak.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Are you giving me a bath? Hehe, I'll give you a
nice pet as thanks!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're so soft and fluffy, Hatsuratsu! I feel like I
could keep petting you forever...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! It's already nighttime! Guess I'll have to
cancel my solo training.
